title: The Man Who Stole the Scream
original_title: The Man Who Stole the Scream
overview: The true story about the master thief who stole Edvard Munch’s iconic painting ‘The Scream’ – told by himself! A witty and wildly entertaining film about boyhood dreams, lost friendships and one of the world’s most famous works of art.
